chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 186 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution. 17.07.2025. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ------------ Mr. Abdul Rehman Bhutto, advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Mazhar Ali Mangan, Advocate for the Petitioner, under instructions does not press instant petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
